Description: Implement -1.5% daily loss stop. When balance drops 1.5% halt all trading until next day. Test with backtest + testnet.
Calculate risk per trade: (ATR×SL_mult) × position_size ≤ 1% capital. Reject trades exceeding limit. Enforce before Bybit order creation.
Track open position notional value. Prevent new entries if total exposure >5% capital. Real-time validator.

Task name: P1.4: Auto SL at order creation (ATR×1.5)
Description: Every Bybit limit order must include SL immediately (ATR×1.5). Use OCO orders. Verify in Bybit history.
On entry open OCO with: Stage 1: Sell 50% @ entry+0.4%. Remaining 50% stays for stage 2. Use Bybit OCO API.
When stage 1 fills create new order: Stage 2: Sell 40% @ entry+0.8%. Remaining 10% for trailing.
Final 10% position: trailing stop @ ATR×0.5. Adjust trailing stop every 5 candles if price moves up.
Log every trade to SQLite: entry_time entry_price pair side SL TP_targets exit_time exit_price PnL status. Persistent storage.

Task name: P3.2: Win rate tracking (closed trades only)
Description: Query SQLite: count(closed trades with PnL>0) / count(all closed trades). Update every 60 seconds. Display as metric.
PF = sum(winning trades) / abs(sum(losing trades)). Target: >1.5. Update real-time from SQLite.
Dashboard pulls from SQLite via WebSocket every 10s. Show: WR% PF daily PnL drawdown trade count. No refresh needed.
Backtest all changes on 2019-2024 data. Run 24h on testnet. Verify SL accuracy TP fills risk enforcement. Gather logs.
Calculate optimal position size = (WR% × 2 - 1) / WR ÷ (1-WR). Apply Kelly × 0.25 (conservative). Dynamic sizing per trade.
After TP stage 1 fills if momentum continues open 50% new position same direction (if exposure <5%). Recycle profits.

Task name: P5.1: Win rate per pair (last 30 days)
Description: Calculate WR% for each pair from last 30 days closed trades. Query: SELECT pair count(PnL>0)/count(*) FROM trades WHERE date>30days_ago GROUP BY pair.
PF per pair = sum(wins) / abs(sum(losses)). Identify strong vs weak pairs. Exclude pairs with PF <1.2.
Score = (WR%×0.5 + PF×0.3 + Vol_score×0.15 + Liq_score×0.05). Get 24h volume from Bybit API. Min $50M volume threshold.
Rank all 25 pairs by score. Select top 10-15 for active trading. Update selection weekly based on metrics.
